ops.body:
Executed end-to-end 2026-07-11. Evidence per criterion:

1. capt-hook **v9.0.0** on PyPI (captain-hook main `ea1984f9`, Release run 29142858309 green; `env -u UV_EXCLUDE_NEWER uvx --from capt-hook==9.0.0` resolves). hooks.json covers all 12 Event members (test `tests/test_plugin_hooks.py`); register-hooks + settings-merge machinery deleted (−1289 LOC). Codex xhigh review: Q1/Q3 clean; Q2 decision-event exempt set double-fire during overlap window ACCEPTED (deliberate once-guard design, window held to minutes).
2. cc-context **v0.12.0** (tag on `c12732c3`-lineage, Release 29162682946 green) and show **0.1.6** (cc-skills `fb91e1aa`) are SessionStart-pack-attach-only.
3. settings-base hooks key deleted (cc-skills `4ae0f48c`) + guard test `test_guides_fragments.py`; `cc-guides-render` broadcast across the fleet; spot-verified origins (cc-notes/spawnllm/cc-steer/cookiesync/17 more) `has("hooks")==false`, Guides runs green.
4. 16 hand-managed repos swept+pushed; getaway fragment reset (`f56b6d46`); captain-hook special case live (`9e2cad70`: `"captain-hook@captain-hook": false`, .venv launcher sole dispatcher); zero canonical groups remain (bioqa non-canonical launcher preserved).
5. Plugin-only dispatch proven live: getaway settings `has("hooks")==false`, fresh headless session still produced a capt-hook session log. SubagentStart/PreCompact/Notification verified REGISTERED (hooks.json + enum-coverage test); their dispatch path is identical to the proven events — the steering SubagentStart nudge's visible output is condition-gated (named teammates), so not directly observed in the smoke run.

Also shipped alongside: repo-bootstrap v0.41.1 (`fixes` pack in all templates, `fee8aaa0`), getaway packs + fixes, cc-guides 0.1.18 GHA cleanup (`ci-render` subcommand + `install/` composite, action-v1 → `abf82d46`, live-validated re-render run 29163642208). Coordination notes left in acct-08's daemon plan (register-hooks-dependent steps voided) and pretzel plan (all phases marked executed).
